description_long: This is a single high-top boot designed for cold weather, featuring a tan leather exterior with visible brown stitching and a white, fluffy inner lining for insulation. The boot has a robust, white rubber sole with a black trim, providing both grip and durability for urban environments. Brown and black round laces are threaded through metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern, and a functional zipper is present on the inner side for easy access. The heel area is reinforced with a padded black collar for added comfort and ankle support. A rectangular label with red text is sewn onto the tongue, adding a branded touch. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, weather-resistant shoe suitable for everyday wear in city settings.
description: A tan high-top boot with a white fluffy lining, brown laces, a side zipper, and a sturdy white rubber sole, designed for warmth and durability in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, criss-cross lacing, and the branded tongue label.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the tan leather, brown stitching, and the functional zipper along with the padded black collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded black heel collar, heel pull tab, and the fluffy white lining inside the boot.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tan leather, stitching, and the absence of a zipper on this side.
attribute_logo: rectangular red and white label on the tongue
